title: German Statutory Health Insurance (GKV) - Payer Infrastructure
problem: German statutory health insurers (Krankenkassen) need efficient claims processing, coverage verification, and provider reimbursement.
solution: GKV billing and claims infrastructure. Unified fee schedules (EBM), claims processing, and provider reimbursement. Integration with practice management systems through telematics infrastructure.
technology: EBM fee schedules, claims processing, telematics integration
varden_fit: CRITICAL — German GKV has claims infrastructure but lacks advanced eligibility verification and prior auth automation. This is the opportunity.
notes: CONTRARIAN: German GKV processes billions in claims but lacks modern eligibility and prior auth tools. Blue ocean.
